texto: The life bears a likeness to a song, it, though low or high, pours the whole of itself into each musical note. The song will be only wonderful if a singer sings it in the perfect pitch. This resembles to the life, it overwhelms with tasks that you have to finish. Thus, you must come up with proper timetable to bring strength to your health before doing well everything. I consider health as the most important reward of this life. Just put it in priority, don't ruin it due to any reasons
explicacao: Orientação direta de AnhTri sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “The life bears a likeness to a song, it, though low or high, pours the whole of itself into each …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, life-and-living, health, útil em momentos de reflexao.
